chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-2157/2015 Date Order with signature of Judge Disposed of Matter For hearing of CMA No.19444/2015 20.11.2015 Mr. Fiaz H. Shah, advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Salman Talibuddin, Addl. Attorney General. ---------------------------------- Counsel for the Petitioner contends that whenever Petitioner intended to export mangoes the Operation Department of Plant Protection, Ministry of National Food Security raised objections as to the quality of the wooden boxes in which mangoes are packed. He further states that the department may be directed to approve the samples of the wooden boxes so that in future they may not have objection. This petition was disposed of on 16.07.2015. As no appeal has been filed by any of the parties, the order attained finality and the parties are bound to comply with the decision. If there is any future cause of action with regard to the wooden boxes, the same are to be examined and if any objection is raised, the validity of such objection is to be agitated in separate proceedings and not in this case. However, in order to avoid future litigation, let the Petitioner provide 06 samples of wooden boxes as per the specifications referred to in the final order of this petition for approval. Chief Justice. Judge Ayaz/PA
